li.label: Nearsighted
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] finds it difficult to focus on distant targets, and prefer to get up close and personal.

li.label: Farsighted
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] could spot a target from nearly a hundred meters, yet still somehow walk into walls.

li.label: Athletic
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s movements are smooth and graceful.

li.label: Stiff
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is so rigid, it's almost like [PAWN_pronoun] is souless.

li.label: Good Hygiene
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] takes care of [PAWN_possessive] personal hygiene.

li.label: Poor Hygiene
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] doesn't care about [PAWN_possessive] hygiene, and sometimes get sick from bad food.

li.label: Persuasive
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] often gets [PAWN_possessive] way with things.

li.label: Unconvincing
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has never won a debate in [PAWN_possessive] life.

li.label: Resilient
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been in plenty of fights since [PAWN_pronoun] was a kid, and had built up a tolerance to injury and pain as a result.

li.label: Fragile
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived a pampered life until now, and is unused to the brutal challenges present out in the Rim.

li.label: Energetic
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] always tackle his tasks with great enthusism.

li.label: Sluggish
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is slow. Sooo... slooow...

li.label: Restful
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] always sleep like a baby.

li.label: Restless
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] often has a difficult time falling asleep.

li.label: Efficient
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is quite productive when it comes to work.

li.label: Inefficient
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is somewhat of a bottleneck in the colony.

li.label: Valiant
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is brave, [PAWN_pronoun] would stand [PAWN_possessive] where others would scramble and run.

li.label: Craven
li.description: When there's a fight, [PAWN_nameDef] is the first to run.

li.label: Rowdy
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] likes a good fight, [PAWN_pronoun] will sometimes start a fight just because [PAWN_pronoun] can.

li.label: Composed
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is usually calm and collected.

li.label: Heat Tolerant
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is more comfortable being in hot environment than his peers.

li.label: Heat Intolerant
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] does not like being in the heat.

li.label: Cold Tolerant
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is more comfortable being in cold environment than his peers.

li.label: Cold Intolerant
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] does not like being in the cold.

li.label: Muscular
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a well built body, people around [PAWN_pronoun] find that rather attractive.

li.label: Frail
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] looks a bit fragile, but not in a lovable way.

li.label: Abstinent
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] doesn't eat or drink much.

li.label: Ravenous
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a bottomless pit for a stomach.

li.label: <color=#00ff00>Trait Demo: Common</color>
li.description: This is what a common trait would look like when paired with RimTraits: Vanilla Trait Colours.

li.label: <color=#1f75fe>Trait Demo: Uncommon</color>
li.description: This is what an uncommon trait would look like when paired with RimTraits: Vanilla Trait Colours.

li.label: <color=#9f40ff>Trait Demo: Rare</color>
li.description: This is what a rare trait would look like when paired with RimTraits: Vanilla Trait Colours.

li.label: <color=#d4af37>Trait Demo: Epic</color>
li.description: This is what an epic trait would look like when paired with RimTraits: Vanilla Trait Colours.

li.label: <color=#e0115f>Trait Demo: Legendary</color>
li.description: This is what a legendary trait would look like when paired with RimTraits: Vanilla Trait Colours.

li.label: Gifted
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is naturally talented, [PAWN_pronoun] gets a headstart before everyone else.

li.label: Incompetent
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is someone everyone loves to hate.

li.label: Patient Cook
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] takes great care in the preparation of food, [PAWN_pronoun] never skip a step just to have an early meal.

li.label: Impatient Cook
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] couldn't care less about following the recipes as long as [PAWN_pronoun] can get food into [PAWN_possessive] mouth in record time.

li.label: Healthy
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lives a healthy lifestyle, and wakes up feeling energetic and cheerful.

li.label: Chronically Ill
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] gets ill quite often, and seem to require more effort to get out of bed than the average person.

li.label: Temperature Tolerant
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is comfortable in all seasons.

li.label: Temperature Intolerant
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] thinks that summer is way too hot, and winter is way too cold.

li.label: Coordinated
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has good reaction time and finds physical activities less stressful than [PAWN_possessive] peers.

li.label: Clumsy
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is easily distracted and often mess up when it comes to physical activities.

li.label: Hardy
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is what people refer to as a 'stronk boi'.

li.label: Feeble
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is so fragile, it doesn't take much to take [PAWN_objective] out of action.

li.label: Easily Amused
li.description: Whether by sheer optimism or a force of personality, [PAWN_nameDef] always manages to see the bright side of life.

li.label: Constantly Bemused
li.description: Life to [PAWN_nameDef] is an endless, boring joke that [PAWN_pronoun] just can't get away from.

li.label: Inquisitive
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has an interest in understanding the workings of the world, and is able to apply [PAWN_possessive] knowledge in daily life.

li.label: Ignorant
li.description: Gaps in [PAWN_nameDef]'s education and general lack of curiosity makes life often stressful for [PAWN_objective].

li.label: tidy
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] likes to keep [PAWN_possessive] surroundings clean, and is used to being in an organised environment.

li.label: messy
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] often neglect their surroundings, making it difficult for [PAWN_objective] to get work done.

li.label: All out of fucks
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has no more fucks to give.

li.label: Astronomer
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is made for designing colonies on the rimworlds.

li.label: Authoritarian
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a little pushy, but with it comes natural authority.

li.label: Backpacker
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] loves being outdoors, exploring new things. And [PAWN_pronoun] knows how to pack for whatever it takes [PAWN_objective].

li.label: Blader
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] loves sharp, bladed weapons and is deadly wielding them.

li.label: Botanist
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] loves all things growing. And [PAWN_pronoun] has a very good hand with them.

li.label: Braggart
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] always talks about [PAWN_possessive] own accomplishments. It's pretty tiresome, but has its uses.

li.label: Edgy
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is almost over the edge. Dont push [PAWN_objective].

li.label: Small talker
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is all about small talk.

li.label: Cautious
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] practices 'better safe than sorry'.

li.label: Cheerful
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is just a bucket of joy.

li.label: Clever
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a sharp mind.

li.label: Combat medic
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is trained in speedy treatment.

li.label: Complainer
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is the kind of person who thinks everything is everbody else's fault.

li.label: Living bioreactor
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s body just works a bit differently. [PAWN_pronoun] eats a lot, but has a lot of energy an strength in return.

li.label: Daredevil
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is the definition of 'head on'. Sometimes it's not to [PAWN_possessive] benefit.

li.label: Steady hands
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has steady hands.

li.label: Determined
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is determined and won't fold easily.

li.label: Doomed
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is doomed.

li.label: Early riser
li.description: Every new day equals new opportunities.[PAWN_nameDef] is as eager to explore them all.

li.label: Developer
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] always finds a way to improve things.

li.label: Defensive fighter
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] always takes a defensive stance when fighting. [PAWN_pronoun] takes and deals less damage.

li.label: Flincher
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a pretty bad habit of closing [PAWN_possessive] eyes when something's coming at [PAWN_objective].

li.label: Florist
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has great hands with all things growing.

li.label: Freerunner
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is everywhere all the time.

li.label: Rolled up sleeves
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is the sort of person who does [PAWN_possessive] job and let everybody else worry about the rest.

li.label: Healty routines
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] takes everyday routines seriously.

li.label: Riflesmith
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] loves crafting and shooting rifles and other bigger guns. And not much else.

li.label: Mason
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is all about the stones.

li.label: Fighter
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] likes to fight. And [PAWN_pronoun]'s good at it.

li.label: Ruthless
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] does whatever it takes and not very often in the nicest of ways.

li.label: Devout
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is all about spreading the faith through words.

li.label: Zealot
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is fighting in the name of [PAWN_possessive] faith.

li.label: Behemoth
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is huge. Strong, but slow in two different ways.

li.label: Uncultured
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is not interested in that. Nope, not that either.

li.label: Substance tolerant
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s body doesn't respond much to any kind of substances. For good or bad.

li.label: Spindly
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has long arms and legs. [PAWN_pronoun] moves fast, but is a little frail and doesn't have perfect control of [PAWN_possessive] limbs.

li.label: Junk artist
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] can make good looking stuff from pretty much anything.

li.label: Direct hitter
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a habit of hitting [PAWN_possessive] enemies the right way.

li.label: Indirect hitter
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has a habit of hitting [PAWN_possessive] enemies the wrong way.

li.label: Exile
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is doing all [PAWN_pronoun] can to not piss someone off.

li.label: Wild child
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is gonna be a wild child all [PAWN_possessive] life.

li.label: Go-getter
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] knows what [PAWN_pronoun] wants and usually gets it.

li.label: Sloppy
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is simply sloppy.

li.label: Cage fighter
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is a fearsome fighter with fists and blunt weapons.

li.label: Likes summer
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] believes summer is the best time of year.

li.label: Likes fall
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] believes fall is the best time of year.

li.label: Likes winter
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] believes winter is the best time of year.

li.label: Likes spring
li.description: [PAWN_nameDef] believes spring is the best time of year.

li.label: Petty
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is overtly concerned with social hitches. {PAWN_pronoun} tends to annoy others and can't stand {PAWN_possessive} ex-lovers moving on.

li.label: Charismatic
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a shining personality. {PAWN_possessive} words can get through to others more than usual.

li.label: Eccentric
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} Acts abnormally, probably due to their oddly high intelligence. {PAWN_pronoun} often makes a larger impact socially... For better or worse. {PAWN_nameDef} is so out of the social loop, {PAWN_pronoun} doesn't realise when {PAWN_pronoun} is being insulted.

li.label: Conductor
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} leads the movement of others well. Colonists around {PAWN_nameDef} move faster.

li.label: Commander
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is an effective leader in ranged combat. Colonists around {PAWN_nameDef} have better aim.

li.label: Hermit
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} prefers being solitary. {PAWN_pronoun} is better at working with plants anyways.

li.label: Peppy
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is full of energy. {PAWN_pronoun} will randomly gain the Frenzy Go Inspiration, even if {PAWN_pronoun} is not happy.

li.label: Volatile Crafter
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is a genius crafter, and will often have creative inspiration. However, {PAWN_possessive} mind is constantly ticking, making {PAWN_nameDef} much more likely to have a mental break.

li.label: Luminary
li.description: For whatever reason, everyone seems to really care how {PAWN_nameDef} is feeling.

li.label: Tyrannic
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} harshly criticizes and dictates the actions of others. Colonists around {PAWN_nameDef} move and work faster, but receive a mood debuff from the added stress.

li.label: Venturous
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loves to take risks and complete quests. {PAWN_pronoun} will recieve mood buffs for successful quests, and debuffs for failed quests.

li.label: misanthrope
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} hates everyone equally.

li.label: dysgeuisia
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was born without a sense of taste and cannot enjoy food.

li.label: eclectic palate
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loves to eat food with a variety of ingredients but will be upset over bland food.

li.label: pacifist
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} hates violence and wouldn't hurt a fly. They'll get upset if forced to do so.

li.label: narcoleptic
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} suffers from a neurological disorder that makes {PAWN_pronoun} prone to randomly fall alseep anywhere.

li.label: pyrophobia
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is irrationally afraid of fire and will flee the scene if not drafted. {PAWN_pronoun} hates getting burns.

li.label: nyctophobia
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is afraid of the dark. They'll will be extra unhappy when in darkness and has trouble sleeping without light.

li.label: loves sleeping
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} always feels good after a good night's sleep.

li.label: good Constitution
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was born with a strong, healthy body. They can carry more, mine faster, deal more damage in melee combat and take reduced damage from attacks.

li.label: poor Constitution
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was unfortunately born with a weak, feeble body. They cannot carry as much as everyone else, mine slower, deal less damage in melee and take increased damage from attacks.

li.label: apathetic
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has no goals in life. No dreams, motivation or passions. It's going to take a lot to break what is left of them.

li.label: entomophobia
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has an intense fear of insects and will not hesitate to run away upon spotting one.

li.label: entomophagous
li.description: Having had easy access to insect meat during most of their life {PAWN_nameDef} became accustomed to eating it to the point that {PAWN_pronoun} preferred it over normal meat.

li.label: gregarious
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loves the company of others. The more, the merrier.

li.label: pluviophile
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loves the rain. {PAWN_pronoun} doesn't mind being wet and gets happy during rainy weather.

li.label: chionophile
li.description: There's nothing {PAWN_nameDef} loves more than snow! No amount of snow is going to slow them down.

li.label: moody
li.description: It doesn't take much to make {PAWN_nameDef} either really excited or to bring {PAWN_possessive} mood completely down.

li.label: early bird
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} prefers to wake up early in the day to get as much work done as possible during the day.\n\n{PAWN_pronoun} gets a mood boost if awake during the early hours of a day (5h-12h) and mood loss if awake during the evening (17h-0h).

li.label: communal
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has grown accustomed to a tightly nit colony and loves sleeping in barracks. Preferably with many other pawns.

li.label: sadist
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} likes seeing other pawns suffer and gets excited from causing damage.

li.label: vulgar
li.description: For whatever purpose, {PAWN_nameDef} has taught {PAWN_objective}self every swear word in the dictionary and uses this profane knowledge unconsciously in {PAWN_possessive} day-to-day life.

li.label: comedian
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} always tries to raise their fellow pawns' mood by telling jokes. Or try to, at least.

li.label: claustrophobic
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} hates being in confined spaces.

li.label: congenital analgesia
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} was born without the ability to feel pain. {PAWN_pronoun} is unable to experience psychic phenomena as a side effect.

li.label: gun crazy
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loves guns! Especially shooting them. If {PAWN_pronoun} hits or not isn't important.

li.label: hyperalgesia
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has a rare disorder that makes {PAWN_pronoun} extremely sensitive to pain, making anything painful so much worse.

li.label: fast metabolism
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s body works at a faster rate than a normal person, letting them heal faster at the cost of getting hungry quicker.

li.label: slow metabolism
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef}'s body works at a slower rate than a normal person, healing much slower as a result. At least they don't eat as much.

li.label: thermophile
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} just loves the heat and won't suffer any negative thoughts related to being warm. {PAWN_pronoun} despises being cold, though.

li.label: cryophile
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} just loves the cold and won't suffer any negative thoughts related to being cold. {PAWN_pronoun} despises being warm, though.

li.label: family oriented
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} values the concept of a family very highly, and likes to guide young minds. Knowing that the families in the colony are happy is important to them and being a parent is one of {PAWN_pronoun}'s dreams.

li.label: hates children
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} despises children. To {PAWN_pronoun} they're small, loud and obnoxious parasites that ruin every place they infest. {PAWN_nameDef} actively go out of {PAWN_pronoun}s way to avoid having children.

li.label: pressure cooker
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} has issues letting their feelings bottle up and consequentially eventually explodes from all the stress. They'll break more often than normal pawns but they'll feel massive relief for a long period of time afterwards.

li.label: composed
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is able to keep cool under pressure, and will even perform better when there's a risk for mental breaks.

li.label: soylent need
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} tasted the green sludge once and can't get enough of it now. {PAWN_pronoun} will prefer to eat from a Nutrient Paste Dispenser over anything else.

li.label: animal whisperer
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is strangely proficient at dealing with animals of all kinds and sizes and never triggers attacks if taming attempts fail. {PAWN_pronoun} likes having animals in the colony, having bonded animals and especially loves getting nuzzled.

li.label: sleepyhead
li.description: {PAWN_nameDef} loves to sleep in and will gladly ignore their schedule if it means they can lie in bed and sleep some more.
